plugins.name: get-it-done
plugins.description: Autonomous 5-agent team (Planner, Analyst, Executor, Validator + post-cycle Reflector) with a thin dispatcher (/continue). Main relay: PLANNING → ANALYZING? → EXECUTING ↔ VALIDATING → REPORTING → COMPLETE off project-local state in team/. Reflector runs once post-completion as an independent sub-agent.
